title: Trump's Investment in ASTS Reveals Space Stock Bet
text: Trump bought between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of ASTS stock and $15,001-$50,000 worth of RKLB shares, according to recently disclosed filings. The investment appears connected to Trump's broader space defense agenda and his proposed Golden Dome missile-defense initiative. Following the disclosure, ASTS stock rose 2% overnight as retail sentiment turned bullish. Investors viewed the basket as a broader bet on satellite broadband, launch infrastructure, AI defense systems, communications networks and semiconductor demand. On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around ASTS drew bullish sentiment with high message activity following the disclosure. The investment by Trump, known for his focus on space initiatives and defense, signals potential tailwinds for space-based broadband companies like ASTS, particularly regarding government contracts and national security applications.
